What you'll learn

Learn how to set up your first agent

Hands-on introduction to n8n, to help you get started right away

Step-by-step guide

Join us live and receive a step-by-step guide to create your first AI Agent

Real use cases to kickstart your journey

Discover why n8n is so popular and how to leverage this in your day to day

Why this topic matters

AI agents are reshaping how we get work done, automating repetitive tasks, making decisions, and triggering actions autonomously. In this lightning lesson, you'll discover how to build your own agents using n8n, the popular platform buzzing around. This beginners lesson gives you the practical skills to go from zero to a working agent in under 30 minutes.

![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/v9qIDiGZTFw/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [n8n Starter Sessions: Paris](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v9qIDiGZTFw)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [n8n](https://www.youtube.com/@n8n-io)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-09-17
**Published at**: 2025-09-17
**Length**: 3:24:38
**Views**: 9471
**Likes**: 304
**Category**: Entertainment

## Description

```
This is the livestream of our in-person workshop in Paris on September 17. If you have any questions for Aemal, head to https://vibestage.aemalsayer.com !

---

Join us for a hands-on, starter session where we’ll take you from the fundamentals of n8n, to building your first AI-powered agent!

​This workshop is led by n8n and powered by Avanai, the new company of our Berlin workshop wizard, Aemal Sayer, and Christian Voigt.

​Perfect for beginners and those new to n8n and automation: in just a few hours, you’ll learn the core concepts of n8n, see how to connect your favorite apps and data sources, and discover how to integrate AI into your workflows. By the end, you’ll have a working automation and the skills to create many more!

​Agenda:

- ​Welcome & Introduction – Why automation and AI matter now
​- n8n Essentials – Quick start and core concepts
- ​AI + Automation – How to integrate AI agents into workflows
- ​Hands-On Build – Create your own automation
- ​Q&A & Next Steps – Resources, community, and how to keep building
```

Welcome to The n8n Masterclass. I’m Dylan Watkins.
